source_pr.title: expression, planner: remove some fields from `expression.Column`
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/community/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->

- To strengthen the meaning for `UniqueID`
- For the case that there're a lot of `UNION`, the CPU usage of `Schema` and `Column` is around 25%. This pr enables possibility to optimize it.
- Make it possible to not call `schema.Clone` and `Column.Clone` in the future.
- Clean up fields.

### What is changed and how it works?

- Clean the fields `XXXXName` in `expression.Column`. They don't affect the optimization logic.
- Remove the field `IsReferenced`. It's introduced by expression rewriter. We can remove it by simply reset the name to empty.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test

Code changes

 - Has exported function/method change
 - Has exported variable/fields change

symptoms: result: "TableReader(Table(t))->Sort->Window(avg(cast(Column#1)) over(order by Column#1 asc, Column#2 desc range between unbounded preceding and current row))->Projection", (planner/core/logical_plan_test.go)
failure_signature: result: "TableReader(Table(t))->Sort->Window(avg(cast(Column#1)) over(order by Column#1 asc, Column#2 desc range between unbounded preceding and current row))->Projection", (planner/core/logical_plan_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
